syntax_notes: IOS-like CLI with flat interface numbering (GigabitEthernet1..N).
No 'ip routing' global command; L3 behaviour is controlled per firmware defaults.
Smart switch: Layer 2 only with basic management.
platform_warnings: CBS/Cisco Business switches run an IOS-like CLI that is NOT classic IOS. Many commands differ (flat port naming such as GigabitEthernet1, no 'ip routing' command, different management commands). Review every generated line before use.

feature_warnings.ospf: OSPF is not supported on this platform.
feature_warnings.eigrp: EIGRP is not supported on this platform.
feature_warnings.bgp: BGP is not supported on this platform.
feature_warnings.nat: NAT is not supported on this platform.
feature_warnings.subinterfaces: Router subinterfaces are not supported on this platform.
feature_warnings.pagp: Only LACP is supported for link aggregation; PAgP is unavailable.
